title: premna mollissima
intro: Premna mollissima, also known as Chinese Chaste Tree or Indian bay leaf, is a flowering plant native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and lowering blood pressure. Premna mollissima can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
